title: Junior Instructional Designer at Mumbai University Global Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Mumbai University Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Mumbai University Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mumbai University Global Group:
Mumbai University Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mumbai University Global Group!
